creator: codeblock@eighthbit.net
text:
It appears the http://rubyforge.iasi.roedu.net/files/ RubyForge mirror is down and has been for a few days. I can override with make.conf, or just wait till ports moves on to the next mirror, but thought that it should be noted.

How-To-Repeat: Install any port whose MASTER_SITES is RF.
